info.title: CargoWiseReportTemplateCreator
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 Kristian Skov Johansen
t, table      Required. What table you want a report from.
c, columns    Required. What table you want a report from.
w, where      The additional where clause to add to the select statement.
o, output     (Default: out.xlsx) Name of the output file
d, delete     (Default: false) If the program should remove an existing output
file or append to it instead.
help          Display more information on a specific command.
version       Display version information.
